question: How would you design a highly available web application, and what architectural decisions would you make to ensure reliability and scalability?
How would you design a system capable of handling one million users while maintaining performance, availability, and scalability?
How would you design a scalable API platform for high traffic, and what trade-offs would you consider?
How would you design a scalable and reliable file upload system similar to Google Drive?
How would you design a real-time notification system that supports high throughput and low latency?
How would you design an application to remain available if an entire availability zone becomes unavailable?
How would you identify and resolve a database bottleneck in a production system?
What techniques would you use to reduce application latency, and how would you evaluate their effectiveness?
How would you design and scale an application for global users while minimizing latency and ensuring high availability?
When would you choose object storage instead of block storage, and what trade-offs would influence your decision?
How do you decide between SQL and NoSQL databases, and what factors influence your choice?
How do you decide between a monolithic architecture and microservices for a new application?
When would you choose managed cloud services instead of self-hosted solutions, and what trade-offs would you consider?
How would you design a system to achieve 99.99% availability?
What are Recovery Time Objective (RTO) and Recovery Point Objective (RPO), and how would you apply them in a real-world disaster recovery strategy?
What are the differences between active-active and active-passive architectures, and when would you choose each approach?
How would you recover from a complete regional failure while minimizing downtime and data loss?
How would you detect, contain, and recover from data corruption in a production environment?
How would you secure a cloud application end-to-end from infrastructure to application layer?
How does Identity and Access Management (IAM) integrate with cloud services to enforce secure access control?
How would you secure APIs against common threats while maintaining usability and performance?
What is zero trust architecture, and how would you implement it in an enterprise environment?
What encryption strategies would you use to protect data at rest and in transit in a cloud environment?
How would you design and manage secrets securely across applications and infrastructure?
How would you design a virtual private cloud (VPC) for a three-tier application architecture?
How would you enable secure communication between services in a distributed application?
How would a private subnet application securely access the internet while remaining isolated from inbound traffic?
How would you design secure and reliable communication between multiple cloud regions?
Can you explain how DNS resolution works and how it affects application availability and performance?
How do routing decisions influence application performance, security, and reliability in cloud environments?
How would you design hybrid connectivity between on-premises infrastructure and the cloud using technologies such as VPN or Direct Connect?
How would you scale a read-heavy application while maintaining performance and consistency?
How do caching, content delivery networks (CDNs), load balancing, auto scaling, and database sharding improve scalability and performance?
How would you reduce cloud infrastructure costs without compromising performance, reliability, or security?
How would you investigate a production system that meets performance requirements but has unexpectedly high infrastructure costs?
Can you describe a major production incident you handled, including the root cause, resolution, and lessons learned?
How would you troubleshoot an application that is responding slowly even though CPU utilization remains low?
How would you investigate and resolve intermittent request failures in a production environment?
How would you design a reliable and secure CI/CD pipeline for enterprise applications?
How would you manage infrastructure as code at scale while maintaining consistency, governance, and collaboration?
How would you design a deployment strategy that supports safe rollbacks with minimal downtime?
What are the differences between OLTP and OLAP systems, and when would you use each?
What are the differences between a data lake and a data warehouse, and when is each appropriate?
How do you decide between streaming and batch data processing for a given business requirement?
When designing a system, how do you gather and clarify functional and non-functional requirements before proposing an architecture?
How do you justify architectural decisions by balancing scalability, security, availability, cost, and business requirements?
How would you explain a complex system architecture to both technical and non-technical business stakeholders?
